block with real content, then run the usual draft-first workflow (branch, PR, preview, deploy). Banned-words list is enforced in CI. When in doubt, run locally: python scripts/tone_guard.py --files-from --> <!-- FILL IN: e.g. Neutropenic Sepsis — Mohsin Haematology Academy -->
Home Guidelines Education Journal Club About Open HaemCalc

  • Interpretation
Scope
Intended users
Evidence base
Version / last reviewed
v1.0 · · Dr Muhammad Mohsin, Consultant Haematologist

Clinical decision support only

Clinical decision-support only. Not for direct patient use. Use alongside local policy, senior clinical judgement, and patient-specific context. Local trust policies take precedence over any content on this page. It is not a substitute for direct patient assessment, MDT discussion, or specialist advice. For prescribing, always check renal and hepatic function, weight, bleeding risk, drug interactions, pregnancy status, and the current Summary of Product Characteristics before administration. Off-label use must be clearly flagged. See the site governance page for scope, limitations, and medico-legal framing.

1. Input

2. Output

3. Interpretation

4. Suggested Action

This tool supports, not replaces, clinical judgement. Local policies take precedence.

Red flags — escalate immediately

5. Guideline Basis

How to cite this page

APA: Mohsin M. (). . Mohsin Haematology Academy. https://mohsinhaemacademy.com/guidelines//

Vancouver: Mohsin M. . Mohsin Haematology Academy; . Available from: https://mohsinhaemacademy.com/guidelines//

BibTeX 
@misc{mohsin__,
  author = {Mohsin, Muhammad},
  title  = {},
  year   = {},
  url    = {https://mohsinhaemacademy.com/guidelines//},
  note   = {Mohsin Haematology Academy}
}

Suggest an improvement

Spotted an error, out-of-date reference, or unclear step? Email Dr Mohsin .
